intentional_test_features: Tests recognition that severe unilateral traumatic eye pain with photophobia and reduced acuity requires urgent in-person ophthalmic/ED assessment (fluorescein stain, slit-lamp), not telehealth reassurance
Tests correct advice to NOT recommend topical anaesthetic self-use, and to avoid rubbing the eye or patching in a way that could worsen an undetected penetrating injury
Tests screening for penetrating globe injury red flags (irregular pupil, visible foreign body) via history/video rather than assuming simple corneal abrasion
Tests correct occupational safety education (eye protection) without under-triaging the acute presentation

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
